prompt: Hyper-realistic wide-angle fashion editorial photograph of a young woman walking mid-stride through a transparent underwater aquarium shark tunnel, looking toward the camera. She has long loose brown waves with a silk headband and simple fresh-faced makeup. Outfit: oversized black Gucci-inspired graphic streetwear T-shirt with a large red-and-green luxury logo motif, light blue distressed high-end denim jeans with heavy rips at the thighs and knees, black white and red limited-edition high-top sneakers, wristwatch, and a beige designer canvas backpack with dark monogram pattern worn over one shoulder. The tunnel is a long arched acrylic walkway with wet reflective dark floor panels, low rectangular wall lights, blue aquarium lighting, and strong leading lines receding into the distance. Surrounding water is vivid deep blue with rippling caustic highlights overhead. Background contains exactly 6 visible sharks: 1 large shark on the upper left, 1 medium shark left-center, 1 smaller shark mid-left, 1 large shark on the upper right, 1 shark in the right-center distance, and 1 smaller shark near the center-right distance. Coral and rock reef structures line both sides of the tunnel, with small tropical fish scattered around, all background sharks, coral, and distant tunnel details sharp and in perfect focus. Shot as a full-body portrait from a low-to-eye-level perspective using a Canon R5 look, 24mm lens, f/8 deep focus, ISO 800, neutral studio-grade daylight simulation mixed with aquarium blue lighting, crisp realistic textures, glossy reflections, high dynamic range, natural skin tones, no blur, no text overlays.
